# Welcome to DIMSpy’s documentation![¶](#welcome-to-dimspy-s-documentation "Permalink to this headline")

[![Py versions](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/dimspy.svg?style=flat&maxAge=3600)](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/dimspy/) [![Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/dimspy.svg?style=flat&maxAge=3600)](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/dimspy/) [![Bioconda](https://img.shields.io/conda/vn/bioconda/dimspy?style=flat-square&maxAge=3600)](http://bioconda.github.io/recipes/dimspy/README.html) [![galaxy-eu](https://img.shields.io/badge/usegalaxy-.eu-brightgreen?logo=data:image/png;base64,)](http://usegalaxy.eu) [![Git](https://img.shields.io/badge/repository-GitHub-blue.svg?style=flat&maxAge=3600)](https://github.com/computational-metabolomics/dimspy) [![Build Status (Travis)](https://img.shields.io/travis/computational-metabolomics/dimspy.svg?logo=travis&maxAge=600&style=flat-square)](https://travis-ci.com/computational-metabolomics/dimspy) [![Build Status (AppVeyor)](https://img.shields.io/appveyor/ci/RJMW/dimspy.svg?logo=appveyor&style=flat-square&maxAge=600)](https://ci.appveyor.com/project/RJMW/dimspy/branch/master) [![codecov](https://codecov.io/gh/computational-metabolomics/dimspy/branch/master/graph/badge.svg)](https://codecov.io/gh/computational-metabolomics/dimspy) [![License](https://img.shields.io/pypi/l/dimspy.svg?style=flat&maxAge=3600)](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html) [![binder](https://mybinder.org/badge_logo.svg)](https://mybinder.org/v2/gh/computational-metabolomics/dimspy/master?filepath=notebooks%2Fworkflow.ipynb) [![RTD doc](https://img.shields.io/badge/documentation-RTD-71B360.svg?style=flat&maxAge=3600)](https://dimspy.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) [![gitter](https://badges.gitter.im/Join%20Chat.svg)](https://gitter.im/computational-metabolomics/dimspy?utm_source=badge&utm_medium=badge&utm_campaign=pr-badge&utm_content=badge)

Python package for processing direct-infusion mass spectrometry-based metabolomics and lipidomics data
